content.text:
[cron:b824f7b0-7497-4984-b0ff-d1bd45539f3c daily-email-review-and-whatsapp-reminder] Review the Gmail inbox of atlas.ia.agente@gmail.com using gog with a strict lightweight pass. Only capture: (1) pending items for today, (2) deadlines in the next 3 days, (3) forwarded items from Gustavo that need action today. Limit yourself to the most relevant items only. If a calendar action is obvious, propose or organize it briefly toward toledo970501@gmail.com; do not over-process. Then send Gustavo a concise WhatsApp reminder to +573183718246 with max 5 bullets and one clear next action if needed.
Current time: Wednesday, April 1st, 2026 — 12:48 PM (America/Bogota) / 2026-04-01 17:48 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.
